grep_hits.snippet: "lean_code_with_comments": "/-- claim_3_2 (`AcyclicIffTopologicalOrder`): a CDMG `G` is acyclic\niff it has a topological order. Mirrors\n`lecture-notes/lecture_notes/graphs.tex` Lem at line 224 ver

"lean_code_without_comments": "theorem isAcyclic_iff_hasTopologicalOrder
    [Finite α] (G : CDMG α) :
    G.IsAcyclic ↔ G.HasTopologicalOrder := by
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  ·

    intro hac
"design_choices": "**Existential right-hand side `G.HasTopologicalOrder`, not the relation-level `IsTopologicalOrder G r`.** The LN's Lem reads \"$G$ … has a topological order\" — the order is exist
(`isAcyclic_iff_hasTopologicalOrder`), at the cost of pulling in
"design_choices": "**The LN's single `\\Rem` is split into two named theorems.** Forré–Mooij bundle \"$G_{\\spl(W)}$ is acyclic\" and \"an explicit topological order on $G_{\\spl(W)}$\" under one pa
